text.title: Use Case Modeling Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from backlog title to validated use-case set.

step.name: actor-enumeration
step.action: List primary, secondary, offstage actors with role + scope.

step.name: goal-statement
step.action: Write goal statement single-sentence, single-goal. Tag trace_id.
step.decision-gate: If goal contains " AND ", split into multiple use cases.

step.name: conditions-as-predicates
step.action: Encode preconditions + postconditions as boolean predicates with operators.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run validator. Bump set version_tag. Hand off to AC derivation.
